meaning: adj.初步的,基本的,[化]元素的,自然力的
examples: Literacy now includes elementary computer skills.
A proton is an elementary particle of matter that possesses a positive charge.
The move from elementary school to middle school or junior high can be difficult.
Across the country thousands of elementary, middle and high school students are feeling the impact too.
The school operates within five school buildings: three elementary schools, a middle school and high school.
